content.problemStatement:
Chef has a sequence AAA of 2‚ãÖN2 \cdot N2‚ãÖN integers containing all natural numbers from 111 to NNN **exactly twice**.

Let a sequence BBB containing KKK elements be a subsequence of AAA. We define a **strictly increasing** index sequence I(B)=[I1,I2,‚Ä¶,IK]I(B) = [I_1, I_2, \ldots, I_K]I(B)=[I1‚Äã,I2‚Äã,‚Ä¶,IK‚Äã] such that, BBB can be written as [AI1,AI2,‚Ä¶,AIK][A_{I_1}, A_{I_2}, \ldots, A_{I_K}][AI1‚Äã‚Äã,AI2‚Äã‚Äã,‚Ä¶,AIK‚Äã‚Äã].

A pair of subsequences (P,Q)(P,Q)(P,Q) is said to be good if all of the following conditions satisfy:


Both subsequences have the same length. In other words, ‚à£P‚à£=‚à£Q‚à£|P| = |Q|‚à£P‚à£=‚à£Q‚à£, where ‚à£P‚à£|P|‚à£P‚à£ and ‚à£Q‚à£|Q|‚à£Q‚à£ denote the lengths of PPP and QQQ respectively;
The subsequences PPP and QQQ are disjoint. In other words, there are **no** common elements between I(P)I(P)I(P) and I(Q)I(Q)I(Q);
The subsequences are equal. In other words, Pj=QjP_j = Q_jPj‚Äã=Qj‚Äã for all (1‚â§j‚â§‚à£P‚à£)(1\le j \le |P|)(1‚â§j‚â§‚à£P‚à£).
Find the total number of **distinct ordered** pairs of subsequences (P,Q)(P,Q)(P,Q) that are good.

Two ordered pairs (P1,Q1)(P_1, Q_1)(P1‚Äã,Q1‚Äã) and (P2,Q2)(P_2, Q_2)(P2‚Äã,Q2‚Äã) are considered different iff I(P1)‚âÝI(P2)I(P_1) \ne I(P_2)I(P1‚Äã)ÓÄÝ=I(P2‚Äã) or I(Q1)‚âÝI(Q2)I(Q_1) \ne I(Q_2)I(Q1‚Äã)ÓÄÝ=I(Q2‚Äã).

Since the answer can be very large, print it modulo 998244353998244353998244353.


Input Format

First line contains TTT ‚àí the number of test cases. The description of the test cases is as follows.
The first line of each test case contains a single integer NNN ‚àí the value of NNN.
The second line of each test case contains 2‚ãÖN2 \cdot N2‚ãÖN integers A1,A2,‚Ä¶,A2‚ãÖNA_1, A_2, \ldots, A_{2 \cdot N}A1‚Äã,A2‚Äã,‚Ä¶,A2‚ãÖN‚Äã‚Äã.


Output Format
For each test case, output a single integer ‚àí the total number of **distinct ordered** pairs of subsequences (P,Q)(P,Q)(P,Q) that are good modulo 998244353998244353998244353.
constraints: Sum of NNN over all test cases does not exceed 6‚ãÖ1056\cdot 10^56‚ãÖ105.
